mapper.select: SELECT rp.permission_id FROM sys_role_permission rp INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
